form.costHintOnDemand: Leave blank if supplier cost is not confirmed yet; you can record it when paying the order.
form.costHintStock: Optional until you have the supplier invoice; leave blank and pay later from the list.
form.clientNotesPlaceholder: Who / reference / sourcing (required when eShop is Client)
form.alreadyPaidTitleClient: Enter a USD cost per unit to mark paid at creation, or leave blank and pay later.
form.alreadyPaidTitleNeedCost: Enter a USD cost per unit above, or leave this unchecked and use Pay for the Order after you know the price.

paymentForm.receivedAndPayTitle: Mark Order as Received and Pay
paymentForm.intro: Enter the UZS and/or USD amount. Leave a field empty or 0 if not used.

cargoForm.title: Pay for Cargo - Order #{{id}}
cargoForm.intro: Enter the UZS and/or USD amount. If cargo was free, enter 0 in both fields and submit.

editCargoForm.title: Edit Cargo Cost - Order #{{id}}
editCargoForm.intro: Update planned cargo cost only. Other order fields stay read-only.

moveForm.title: Move to Inventory - Order #{{id}}
moveForm.returnAdvance: Return advance payment to customer — recorded advance:
moveForm.advanceHint: ≤ advance above · deducted from chosen cash · no FX

table.avgSellingHint: Weighted average planned USD-only line totals per unit ordered (UZS-only lines excluded; no FX)

notifications.selectProductQty: Please select a product and enter a valid quantity.
notifications.selectEshop: Please select or enter an eShop.
notifications.selectCountry: Please select or enter a Supplier Country.
notifications.clientNotesRequired: Enter notes — required when eShop is Client.
notifications.selectCustomerOnDemand: Select a customer for on-demand orders.
notifications.sellingPriceRequired: Enter a selling price per unit in USD.
notifications.paidNeedCost: To mark the order as already paid, enter a USD cost per unit, or leave unpaid and record cost later.
notifications.paidUsdOnly: Recording “already paid” from this form is USD-only. Leave the order unpaid and split UZS/USD in “Pay for the Order”.
notifications.advanceExceedsSelling: Advance cannot exceed planned USD selling total ({{total}}).
notifications.noStatusPermission: You do not have permission to update order status.
notifications.notesRequired: Please enter notes for this order update.
notifications.paymentAmountRequired: Please enter at least one payment amount.
notifications.payOrderBeforeSell: Pay for the supplier order first (Pay for the Order) before selling this on‑demand product.
notifications.payCargoBeforeSell: Pay for the cargo first (use zero totals in that form if there is no freight). You cannot sell this on‑demand item until cargo is marked paid.
notifications.saleCreated: Sale created! Open the Sales tab to complete payment.
notifications.payBeforeInventory: Order payment must be completed before moving to inventory.
notifications.cargoBeforeInventory: Cargo must be marked paid before moving to inventory (use Pay for the Cargo; zero totals if there is no freight).
notifications.advanceReturnRequired: Enter how much advance to return (greater than zero).
notifications.advanceReturnExceeds: Return amount cannot exceed the recorded advance ({{booked}}).
notifications.cargoCostTerminal: Cargo cost cannot be edited after the order is finished.
notifications.cargoCostAlreadyPaid: Cargo cost cannot be edited after cargo has been paid.
notifications.noCancelPermission: You do not have permission to cancel orders.
notifications.orderTerminalReadonly: This order is finished (including cancelled). It is view-only — no further actions are allowed.

confirm.cargoZeroWithPlanned:
This order shows cargo amounts on record:
UZS: {{uzs}}; USD: {{usd}}

You submitted 0 everywhere — cargo will be recorded as FREE and those cargo amounts cleared.

Proceed?
confirm.cargoZeroNoPlanned: Record cargo as paid with no freight charge (all amounts zero)?
confirm.sellProduct:
Sell the product from order #{{id}}?
A pending sale will be created — complete it in Sales.
confirm.cancelOrder:
Cancel Order #{{id}}?

The order record will be kept. Paid supplier/cargo amounts will be reversed when applicable. This cannot undo completed inventory or sold states.
